---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for FitStake
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit?

e.g. "As a user completing a 30-day challenge, I want to receive a daily reminder so that I don't miss a day and lose my stake."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Scope

Does this feature require:
- [ ] Frontend changes only
- [ ] Smart contract changes (higher complexity/risk)
- [ ] Both

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples from other apps, or references that help illustrate the idea.
